evals.prompt: Can you refactor this class to follow better C# practices? [PASTE C# CODE HERE]
evals.expected_output: Inline suggestions showing before/after code with explanations of improvements, using Serena tools to analyze the code structure

evals.prompt: What bugs do you see in this Unity script? [PASTE C# CODE HERE]
evals.expected_output: Bug detection with explanations of issues found (null references, memory leaks, async problems) and suggested fixes

evals.expected_output: Performance analysis identifying bottlenecks and suggestions for optimization using proper Unity patterns and C# best practices
